summaryPatterns: I'm a PHP Developer with 6+ years of experience, built and maintained high-load web applications serving 500+ RPS and led teams of 5-6 backend engineers.
I'm a Senior PHP Developer (8+ years), architected scalable e-commerce platforms processing millions of entities daily with 95%+ delivery accuracy.
I'm a PHP Backend Engineer with 4+ years experience, designed microservices architecture reducing system downtime by 30% and improved performance 60x through database optimization.
I'm a Full-stack PHP Developer (7+ years), developed 130+ products from small plugins to enterprise applications, reduced API failure rates from 20% to <1%.
achievementPhrases: Reduced API failure rates from 20% to <1% through queue implementation
Built e-commerce platform serving 500+ RPS with 95%+ delivery accuracy
Improved system performance 60x through algorithmic database optimization
Led backend team of 5-6 engineers across microservices architecture
Reduced system downtime by 30% through comprehensive monitoring setup
Migrated 400+ classes to PSR-4 improving development efficiency
Decreased MTTR by 30% with OpenTelemetry and Grafana monitoring
Processed millions of entities daily in master data system
Increased active SDK users by 15% through polling solution implementation
Reduced infrastructure incidents by 50% with payment system monitoring
Built AI agent reducing developer routine tasks by 30-40%
Achieved 98% cache hit rate on high-load projects
Supported 130+ products from plugins to enterprise applications
Optimized search performance improving response time by 15%
keyResponsibilities: Design and develop scalable backend services and REST APIs
Optimize database queries and implement caching strategies
Integrate with external payment systems and third-party services
Implement message queues and asynchronous processing
Conduct code reviews and mentor junior developers
Design microservices architecture and domain-driven design
Set up monitoring, logging and observability solutions
Migrate legacy systems and upgrade framework versions
Implement security measures and vulnerability fixes
Collaborate with frontend, mobile and DevOps teams
redFlags: Перечислять более 25 технологий без указания уровня владения
Использовать общие фразы без конкретных цифр и метрик
Не указывать версии PHP и основных фреймворков
Не упоминать опыт с высокими нагрузками для Senior позиций
Указывать только устаревшие технологии (PHP 5.x, MySQL без современных подходов)
Не показывать прогрессию от Junior к Middle/Senior уровню
notes: Backend PHP разработчики в России работают преимущественно с Laravel и Symfony, часто в e-commerce и fintech проектах. Ключевые требования: опыт с высокими нагрузками (500+ RPS), знание современных версий PHP (8.1+), умение проектировать API и работать с очередями. Сильные кандидаты показывают конкретные метрики улучшений (снижение времени отклика, увеличение производительности в разы), опыт миграций и рефакторинга, навыки архитектурного проектирования. Важен опыт интеграций с внешними системами, платежными сервисами, облачными решениями. Senior+ уровень подразумевает лидерство команд, менторинг, принятие архитектурных решений. Популярны Docker, микросервисы, DDD подходы. Мониторинг и observability становятся обязательными навыками.
